title: If you were redubbing Evangelion in English
display_title: If you were redubbing Evangelion in English
wikitext:
[]: If you were redubbing Evangelion in English...             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Apr 28, 2014 6:01 am Simple question: If you were going to be in charge of an English redub of Evangelion, who would you pick? Just for some order, a few rules: 1: They must be alive, And 2: They must not have voiced a character in Evangelion before. Aside from that, anything goes. Here's a few I'd choose: Gendo: Alan Rickman. Come on. Tell me you don't want it. He'd be perfect. Fuyutsuki: John Hurt. John Hurt is a superb actor, and I think he'd be ideal for Fuyutsuki's intelligent, world-weary personality. Keel: Christophr Lee. Once again, needs no explanation. Yui: Olivia Wilde. Olivia Wilde has a lovely, soft voice, and I think she'd really suit Yui well. (Also she's gorgeous, ahem...) I'll probably list more later when i think of them. Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by DocAzure » Fri May 16, 2014 7:15 pm I was thinking more along the lines of people that are known for voice acting to begin with, and for some reason I find myself wanting Steve Blum to voice Gendo, just for the fact that the voice would just...work in my opinion. I'd also have Troy Baker voice Kaji, because, c'mon, that voice is perfect for the charmer. I suck at looking for actors that can convincingly portray children, so I'm just gonna drop those two down.

[]:             Quote Post by Madonna » Fri May 16, 2014 7:18 pm I'd leave it exactly the way it is, the dub is wonderful.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri May 16, 2014 7:20 pm ^ Hear Hear Good Sir

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Fri May 16, 2014 7:25 pm Voices, eh? Gendo: David Kaye Fuyutsuki: Kevin Conroy Ritsuko: Scarlett Johansson Hyuga: Keith David Aoba: Who cares, fuck Aoba Maya: Ellen Paige Kaji: Blum Misato: Dana Delaney Shinji: Jay Baruchel Toji: Channing Tatum Kensuke: Jonah Hill Asuka: Jennifer Hale Rei: Emma Stone I would have to insist the script be rewritten so parts of it sound less like awkward gibberish.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri May 16, 2014 7:53 pm I want black Hyuga back but this time I want him voiced by Samuel L Jackson.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 16, 2014 8:31 pm I’d cast Nic Cage in there somewhere, maybe voicing EVA Uint 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Sat May 17, 2014 2:33 pm Chuckman wrote: Voices, eh? Gendo: David Kaye

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat May 17, 2014 2:37 pm Kaye is a really versatile VA. Dude was Megatron and Sesshomaru. I'm PO'd they didn't have Kaye do Megatron for the movies, and that there's no love for Gary Chalke.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat May 17, 2014 3:49 pm I don't do slebs, so can't give a roster. What I'd do is give it to the team who do the British theatrical dubs for Ghibli films, so I don't have to listen to foreign accents.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat May 17, 2014 4:07 pm Joe Pesci, for every character.

[]:             Quote Post by Mike Mars » Sat May 17, 2014 5:20 pm The only person that really comes to mind for me would be Ron Perlman as Gendo Ikari. His voice is just so beautiful, yet so menacing.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat May 17, 2014 6:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: What I'd do is give it to the team who do the British theatrical dubs for Ghibli films, so I don't have to listen to foreign accents.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun May 18, 2014 7:47 am Man... Eva in an awesome English dub... Would that be possible? I don't know. But it would be awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sun May 18, 2014 1:43 pm Bruno Ganz as Keel. Benedict Cumberbatch as Gendo. Patrick Stewart as Fuyutsuki.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Sun May 18, 2014 1:50 pm Gendou: Liam Neeson Keel: Sean Connery Shinji: Christopher Walken Pen-Pen: Some random Chav off the streets of London Rei: Emma Watson Asuka: Chanty Binx Misato: Maggie Smith Fuyutsuki: Mel Brooks Ritsuko: Kathy Burke Kaji: Malcolm McDowell Aoba: Tom Cruise Hyuga: Samuel L Jackson Ibuki: Betty White

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun May 18, 2014 2:52 pm ^ See?, even Cat enjoys Black Hyuga, thank you Good Sir

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun May 18, 2014 4:11 pm I'm not sure Emma Watson would be good as Rei at all. Then again, I'm not sure I've ever actually heard her voice.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun May 18, 2014 5:17 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Joe Pesci, for every character.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Mon May 19, 2014 8:50 am Chuckman wrote: I'm not sure Emma Watson would be good as Rei at all. Then again, I'm not sure I've ever actually heard her voice.
